description_long: This object is a compact, vintage-style biplane with a short fuselage and a pair of stacked wings, reminiscent of early 20th-century aircraft. The wings are straight and feature prominent struts and bracing wires, giving the plane a classic, robust appearance. The nose houses a visible propeller, and the engine cowling is rounded, with the cockpit situated just behind the upper wing. The landing gear is fixed and consists of two large main wheels and a smaller tail wheel, typical of a taildragger configuration. The tail section features a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, forming a conventional tail design. The surface appears uniformly dark, with a matte finish and minimal visible markings or color variation.
description: A small, vintage biplane with stacked straight wings, a rounded nose with a propeller, and fixed taildragger landing gear. The surface is dark and matte, with classic early aviation features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose, central propeller, and stacked biplane wings with visible landing gear.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the open cockpit behind the upper wing, fixed main wheels, and tail section.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the taildragger landing gear, single vertical stabilizer, and horizontal stabilizers.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the propeller, cockpit placement, and the classic biplane wing structure.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two sets of straight, parallel wings connected by struts; no winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a visible propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open cockpit located just behind the upper wing, likely single-seat.
